---
title: "Research"
toc: true
toc-title: "Contents"
---

## Research Interests

My work combines theoretical advances in **spatial data statistics and econometrics** with empirical applications in urban, regional, and public economics.

**Thematic areas:**

- Land and housing markets (land use, housing policies, short-term rentals)
- Fiscal federalism, inter-municipal cooperation, tax competition
- Spatial disparities, residential mobility and regional convergence
- Environmental and agricultural economics

**Methodological contributions:**

- Exploratory spatial data analysis (ESDA)
- Spatial data & network models (cross-sectional and panel)
- Experimental methods (laboratory, field, correspondence tests)
- Causal inference and impact evaluation

---

## Work in Progress

### Revised and Resubmitted

- Lei, R., Ay, J.-S., Le Gallo, J. Supporting homeownership cost-effectively according to policy objectives: French evidence.
- Piedra-Peña, J.A., Breuillé, M., Le Gallo, J. Borrowing size and functions from nearby cities: The mediating role of inter-municipal cooperation.
- Dabou, Y., Védrine, L., Le Gallo, J. How agricultural subsidies shape local employment: Evidence from the French support policies for mountain areas.
- Chapel, C., Chasco, C., Hilal, M., Le Gallo, J., Velázquez, J. Economic valuation of the benefits of the Natura 2000 network in Castilla-y-Leon (Spain) through rural tourism.

### Revise and Resubmit

- Breuillé, M., Delmas, L., Grivault, C., Le Gallo, J. From transfers to spatial equity: Assessing fiscal equalization effectiveness across French municipalities.
- Ben Youssef, F., Kriaa, M., Le Gallo, J. Origin-country social protection and migration intentions: Causal evidence from Tunisia.
- Lei, R., Ay, J.-S., Dupré, O., Le Gallo, J. Where does housing wealth sit? Evidence from a linked owner-dwellings database, France 2011–2022.

### Submitted

- Flage, A., Le Gallo, J., Ruedin, D. Discrimination during the Paris 2024 Olympics: Evidence from a field experiment on Airbnb.

---

## Research Projects

### Current

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/sgp.png){width="110px"}](https://www.societedesgrandsprojets.fr/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**Grand Paris Express: effects on real estate, residential, and tourism dynamics** (2025–2026)
Société des Grands Projets — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER) and J. Dubé (Univ. Laval)
:::
::::
:::

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/ministere.png){width="110px"}](https://www.cohesion-territoires.gouv.fr/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**Housing tension in France** (2024–2025)
Ministère de la Cohésion des Territoires — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER)
:::
::::
:::

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/bfc.png){width="110px"}](https://www.bourgognefranchecomte.fr/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**Land take in France: determinants, regulation, and housing market consequences** (2023–2026)
Région Bourgogne Franche-Comté — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER)
:::
::::
:::

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/ministere.png){width="110px"}](https://www.cohesion-territoires.gouv.fr/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**From mediatic myths to socio-economic realities: spatial dynamics of rural spaces** (2023–2025)
Ministère de la Cohésion des Territoires — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER)
:::
::::
:::

### Completed

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/apur.png){width="110px"}](https://www.apur.org/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**Evaluation of rent control in Paris (PARIS2019)** (2022–2024)
APUR — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER)
:::
::::
:::

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/ministere.png){width="110px"}](https://www.cohesion-territoires.gouv.fr/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**Effects of collaborative economy on the housing market** (2021–2022)
Ministère de la Cohésion des Territoires — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER)
:::
::::
:::

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/puca.jpg){width="110px"}](https://www.urbanisme-puca.gouv.fr/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**Observing mobilities with digital housing data during the pandemic** (2021–2022)
PUCA — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER)
:::
::::
:::

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/ministere.png){width="110px"}](https://www.cohesion-territoires.gouv.fr/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**Rent indicators for French municipalities** (2018–2020)
Ministère de la Cohésion des Territoires — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER)
:::
::::
:::

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/imagine.png){width="110px"}](https://imajine-project.eu/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**IMAJINE — Integrative Mechanisms for Addressing Spatial Justice and Territorial Inequalities in Europe** (2016–2021)
Horizon 2020 — Coordinated by Univ. Aberystwyth; CESAER partner
:::
::::
:::

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/sgp_old.png){width="110px"}](https://www.societedesgrandsprojets.fr/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**Benefits of urban densification — Grand Paris Express** (2015–2019)
Société du Grand Paris — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER)
:::
::::
:::

::: {.project}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
[![](logos/ministere.png){width="110px"}](https://www.cohesion-territoires.gouv.fr/)
:::
::: {.column width="85%"}
**Determinants of rent formation** (2016–2017)
Ministère du Logement — with M.-L. Breuillé (CESAER) and I. Nappi-Choulet (ESSEC)
:::
::::
:::
